findings.title: Hardcoded system API key and maintenance token
findings.description: Hardcoded SYSTEM_API_KEY and MAINTENANCE_TOKEN constants used for privileged authentication bypass

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: Passwords hashed with MD5 via MessageDigest which is cryptographically broken for password storage

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login endpoint accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: Hardcoded maintenance token bypasses authentication
findings.description: Token validation endpoint accepts hardcoded MAINTENANCE_TOKEN as valid authentication

findings.title: Password reset token exposed in API response
findings.description: Password reset token returned directly in API response instead of being sent via email only
